name: synthetic-reply-chain
description: Outlook 4-message reply thread (back-and-forth between Jordan and Alex). The latest reply embeds the entire chain as quoted From: blocks — Outlook quotes replies in the same format it uses for forwards. Tests that the existing forward-parser handles reply chains identically (no Graph SSO needed when reading the latest message in an Outlook-formatted thread).
captureSource: Synthetic — no real PII. Safe to commit.

body.content:
Sounds good — let's go with that. I'll set up the kickoff for Monday.

Best,
Alex

From: Jordan Kim <jordan.kim@example.com>
Sent: Wednesday, April 22, 2026 11:30 AM
To: Alex Rivera
Subject: Re: Q3 roadmap draft

I added two more items to the roadmap — auth refresh and the metrics dashboard. Take a look when you can.

From: Alex Rivera
Sent: Wednesday, April 22, 2026 9:15 AM
To: Jordan Kim
Subject: Re: Q3 roadmap draft

Looks great. Two questions: should the auth refresh land before or after the dashboards, and is the SRE team aware of the timeline?

From: Jordan Kim
Sent: Tuesday, April 21, 2026 4:50 PM
To: Alex Rivera
Subject: Q3 roadmap draft

Here's the first cut at the Q3 roadmap. Let me know what you think — happy to revise.

rowsInOrder.contains: first cut at the Q3 roadmap
auth refresh and the metrics dashboard
